column1: # Curated jsonb containment oracle: PostgreSQL's documented @> semantics.
# Tab-separated columns: name, haystack, needle, want, pg.
#   want  t/f: the verdict `SELECT haystack::jsonb @> needle::jsonb` yields.
#   pg    y: verified against a real server by
#         s: PostgreSQL cannot evaluate the row (numeric range error on
#            cast); the row documents this library's exact-decimal
#            extension and the script records the server error.
# Documents must not contain literal tab bytes; escape spellings such
# as \t are fine. Every row is also cross-checked in-process against
# --- the array/scalar exception does not nest ------------------------------
# --- scalars: equal scalars contain each other -----------------------------
# --- duplicate keys keep the last occurrence -------------------------------
# --- numeric range: inside numeric, beyond float64 -------------------------
